sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44385" key="eu)/linos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔλῐνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spinning well</tr_>, epith. of Ilithyia, Olenap <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:21:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.21.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
